description: Plugin-distributed hooks for property-management-residential. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags fair-housing risky language, plaintext tenant PII, screening decisions without consistent-criteria notes, and work orders without SLAs. Set PM_RESIDENTIAL_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
